HGSS.525.0000:
Hello!\f
Karate King, the Fighting Dojo’s
master, is in a cave in Johto for\r
further training.
HGSS.525.0001:
Hello!\f
We are letting the Gym Leaders use the
Dojo while the Karate King is away.\f
You can give them a call when you
register their numbers.\f
They say they are happy to accept
your challenge as long as they are\r
not busy.
HGSS.525.0004:
Falkner: Hi! I’ve been waiting for you!\f
It’s a pleasure to be able to battle
you again!\f
HGSS.525.0005:
Falkner: Mmm...
It’s still a long way to become\r
the best Trainer...
HGSS.525.0006:
Bugsy: Good to see you again!\f
Behold my bug research!\f
HGSS.525.0007:
Bugsy: You must have studied
a lot about Pokémon!
HGSS.525.0008:
Whitney: I never break my promises!
Are you ready?\f
HGSS.525.0009:
Whitney: You really are strong!
But I won’t lose next time!
HGSS.525.0010:
Chuck: There you are!\f
Taste my 24-hour training!\f
HGSS.525.0011:
Chuck: Wahaha!
A battle with you is never boring!
HGSS.525.0012:
Jasmine: We’re here as we promised...
Are you prepared?\f
HGSS.525.0014:
Morty: I was just talking about you...
Let’s battle!\f
HGSS.525.0015:
Morty: I’ve lost again...\f
You may have something more than
just strength.
HGSS.525.0016:
Pryce: Finally.\f
No need for words.
A Pokémon battle is the way for us\r
to communicate.\f
HGSS.525.0018:
Clair: ...You are here.
Now let’s battle!\f
HGSS.525.0019:
Clair: Way to go.
...\r
Now give it your all!
HGSS.525.0020:
Lt. Surge: Hey!
The promise we made!\r
Let’s battle again!\f
HGSS.525.0021:
Lt. Surge: Oh no!
You are very strong!\r
But I will repay my debt someday.
HGSS.525.0022:
Sabrina: I knew you’d come!
I had a feeling.\f
What? We promised each other,
so it’s no surprise?\f
...Well, you may be right.\f
HGSS.525.0023:
Sabrina: I know...you will give me a call
again sometime.
HGSS.525.0024:
Erika: How are you?
Good to see you again!\f
This place really doesn’t suit me,\r
but...let’s ignore that and battle!\f
HGSS.525.0025: Erika: You have grown even stronger...
HGSS.525.0026:
Misty: So here you are...
Don’t make me wait!\f
I’ve heard a lot of good things
about you since our last battle.\f
Let me test how good you are!\f
HGSS.525.0027:
Misty: Wow!
You are getting stronger by\r
the battle!
HGSS.525.0028:
Brock: All right!
Time to fulfill our promise!\r
Let’s have a Pokémon battle!\f
HGSS.525.0029:
Brock: I’ve lost again...
You aren’t adventuring around\r
for nothing!
HGSS.525.0030:
Janine: I can’t use my ninja technique,
but I won’t let you win!\f
HGSS.525.0031:
Janine: I lost today,
but I’ll win next time!
HGSS.525.0032:
Blaine: You keep your word.
That’s a good thing, kiddo!\f
HGSS.525.0033:
Blaine: Waaah!\f
If I had known this Dojo was going to be
available, I wouldn’t have needed to\r
rebuild my Gym.\f
Wait! I still did, didn’t I?
HGSS.525.0034:
Blue: Good!
Thanks for coming to lose to me!\f
HGSS.525.0035:
Blue: Hahaha!
My scare tactic doesn’t scare you\r
at all!
